message:
feat(sql): add Arrow IPC, Avro, ORC, and XLSX SQL query support

Add full SQL query capability for four additional file formats:
- Arrow IPC (.arrow, .arrows, .feather): Apache Arrow columnar format
- Avro (.avro): Row-oriented serialization with schema
- ORC (.orc): Optimized Row Columnar format
- XLSX (.xlsx): Microsoft Excel spreadsheets

Implementation includes:
- Table wrappers with ParquetTable-compatible interface
- Format readers for each file type
- SQL executor integration with preload/execute functions
- CLI routing with automatic format detection
- Test fixtures for all formats
